name_en: ❤️ Latest B-Brand Pure Original Mini Bucket Bag, crafted from cotton twill fabric. Made in an Italian workshop with exquisite B-Brand tartan. Features an unlined design and lightweight texture. Finished with smooth calfskin trim and an adjustable shoulder strap for versatile shoulder or crossbody styling. Essential style. Dimensions 17.5 x 10.5 x 20cm
